_description: Cross-language parity fixture for the {{ ... }} template-expression regex. Consumed by src/lib/__tests__/templateExprParity.test.ts (TEMPLATE_EXPR_RE in templateExprRegex.ts) AND by a #[test] in src-tauri/src/indexer/link_graph.rs (template_expr_regex). Both sides MUST produce the same ordered list of matched substrings for every case — divergence turns into a CI failure instead of a silent regex drift. Matches are compared as substrings (not offsets) because JS regex works in UTF-16 code units while Rust's regex crate works in bytes; the logical match set is what must stay in lockstep.

cases.name: fake wiki-link fragment inside body (#330 repro)
expression at end no trailing newline
